+ back to AI Banner Creator Workflow
AI Banner Creator Workflow

Step 03 — Product Info Card

The GPT now produces a Product Info Card covering: product and category, who it’s for, top customer pain points in real user language, what the product promises (separating claims from perception), what proof is actually available, what users want answered before buying, what can be shown in one visual, and what must not be overclaimed or repeated. Review it. If something’s off — a pain point doesn’t match what users actually say, a claim is overstated — tell the GPT to revise. When the card reads true, move on.
